mapper.select: SELECT im.category AS category, im.company_code AS companyCode, im.company_name AS companyName, im.logo_url AS logoUrl, COALESCE(li.link_status, 'AVAILABLE') AS linkStatus FROM institution_master im LEFT JOIN linked_institutions li ON li.institution_master_id = im.id AND li.user_id = #{userId} WHERE im.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY im.sort_order ASC
